summary: Read-only inspector confirmed the web UI/live server boundary: export_diagnostics is support_artifact, not runtime proof; browser layer used basename metadata and count/marker changed_files; raw argv/logs/raw JSON/full paths did not leak into the browser surface.

confirmed_facts.finding: diagnostics export payload is sanitized before browser response.
bundle_path rendering uses artifact metadata/basename rather than full path.
tests cover safe diagnostics export artifact metadata.
diagnostics screen is asserted as support artifact only.

final_diff_references.finding: redaction_status normalization maps only explicit proof to enabled, failures to failed, and unknown values to unreported.
redaction_unreported maps to amber and support-artifact copy.
bundle_path is reduced to basename and changed_files are converted to diagnostics_bundle markers.
test rejects runtime-health green for support artifact result.
test confirms enabled/failed redaction normalization without full path leak.

adjacent_risks.summary: Inspector noted desktop shell raw bundle_path/changed_files display as a future parity topic; this contour is web/live-server only.
